auth_approve.description: Primary button: approve the sign-in request

auth_cancel.description: Secondary button: reject the sign-in request

auth_consentExplainer.description: Short explainer body in the consent popup
auth_consentExplainer.message: Better Lyrics will sign a one-time message proving you control this identity. The site never sees your private key.

auth_consentHeading.description: Consent prompt heading. $ORIGIN$ is replaced with the requesting site, e.g. unison.boidu.dev

auth_consentSubheading.description: Identifies the current BL identity. $NAME$ is the deterministic display name.

auth_invalidRequest.description: Error state shown when the popup receives malformed parameters

auth_pageTitle.description: Browser tab title for the auth consent popup

auth_rememberLabel.description: Checkbox label allowing the user to remember this approval

auth_sessionExpired.description: Shown in the sign-in consent popup when the connection to the extension's service worker is lost before the user can approve or cancel.
auth_sessionExpired.message: Sign-in expired. Please close this window and try again.

builtin_applied.description: Alert after successfully applying a bundled built-in theme

deprecation_builtin_body.description: Body text for the built-in themes deprecation banner
deprecation_builtin_body.message: We're migrating built-in themes to the Theme Marketplace. Some already have, look for the Marketplace badge. The rest will follow in a future update, with CSS backups on GitHub and Discord.

deprecation_builtin_cta.description: CTA button text in the deprecation banner to open the marketplace

deprecation_builtin_title.description: Title for the built-in themes deprecation banner in theme modal
deprecation_builtin_title.message: Heads up, these themes are moving!

editor_tip.message: Dica: Esta aba independente pode ser movida para uma janela separada ou usada em tela dividida junto com YouTube Music para ver suas alterações em tempo real. Para mais informações, visite o

extensionDescription.message: Melhore o YouTube Music com belas letras sincronizadas, suporte multilíngue, traduções em tempo real e mais

lyrics_getShaders.description: Footer button text linking to the Better Lyrics Shaders companion extension

lyrics_noSyncedLyrics.description: Message when no synced lyrics found
lyrics_noSyncedLyrics.message: Better Lyrics não conseguiu encontrar letras sincronizadas

lyrics_notFound.description: Message when no lyrics are available
lyrics_notFound.message: Nenhuma letra encontrada para esta música

lyrics_requestErrorGeneric.description: Button label shown briefly when the request fails for any other reason (catch-all)

lyrics_requestErrorNetwork.description: Button label shown briefly when the request fails for a transport/network reason (no HTTP response received)

lyrics_requestErrorRateLimit.description: Button label shown briefly when the request is rate-limited

lyrics_requestErrorServer.description: Button label shown briefly when the request fails with a 5xx server error

lyrics_requestSyncedLanded.description: Button label when the server reports a synced version already exists; clicking reloads the page

lyrics_requestSyncedVersion.description: Button label asking the community to contribute synced lyrics for the current song

lyrics_requestedFirst.description: Button label after a successful first-ever request for this song

lyrics_requestedNOthers.description: Button label after a successful request when N other people have also requested

lyrics_requestedOneOther.description: Button label after a successful request when exactly one other person has also requested

lyrics_searching.description: Loading message while searching for lyrics

lyrics_submitToUnison.description: Button text for submitting lyrics to Unison

marketplace_lastUpdatedOn.description: Tooltip showing full date when a theme was last updated

marketplace_noThemesMatch.message: Nenhum tema corresponde aos seus filtros

marketplace_shaderFetchFailed.message: Falha ao buscar configuração do shader

marketplace_subtitle.message: Descubra e instale temas da comunidade

marketplace_urlModalError.message: Por favor, digite a URL de um repositório do GitHub

marketplace_urlModalMessage.message: Digite a URL de um repositório do GitHub para instalar um tema diretamente:

marketplace_urlPermissionDesc.message: Instalar temas de URLs personalizadas do GitHub requer um acesso mais amplo do que a loja. Isso permite que Better Lyrics:

marketplace_urlPermissionItem1.message: Buscar arquivos de tema de qualquer repositório do GitHub

marketplace_urlPermissionItem2.message: Detectar o branch padrão do repositório

marketplace_urlPermissionItem3.message: Validar a estrutura do tema antes da instalação

marketplace_urlPermissionNote.message: Esta permissão só é usada ao instalar temas via URL. Temas da loja não precisam dela.

options_alert_downloadInitiated.message: Download do arquivo de identidade iniciado.

options_alert_fileSaveFailed.message: Erro ao salvar o arquivo. Por favor, tente novamente.

options_alert_importEmpty.description: Shown when the user clicks Import with no JSON provided
options_alert_importEmpty.message: Paste identity JSON or choose a file first.

options_detail_shaderImportSuffix.description: Shader import suffix text before Better Lyrics Shaders link

options_detail_shaderInfo.message: Este tema inclui uma configuração de shader.

options_display_albumArt.description: Show album art background setting label
options_display_albumArt.message: Mostrar capa do álbum desfocada como fundo

options_display_autoHideCursor.message: Ocultar cursor automaticamente em tela cheia

options_display_description.message: Ajuste a aparência do Better Lyrics.

options_display_shadersPromo.description: Toggle label for the Shaders companion link shown in the lyrics footer
options_display_shadersPromo.message: Show link to Better Lyrics Shaders

options_display_unisonActions.description: Display-section row label for the Unison Actions modal trigger

options_editor_fullExperienceNote.message: Para a experiência completa do editor,

options_editor_openInNewTabLink.description: Open in new tab link text
options_editor_openInNewTabLink.message: abra este editor em uma nova aba

options_general_autoSwitch.description: Auto switch to lyrics tab setting label
options_general_autoSwitch.message: Mudar automaticamente para a aba de letras

options_general_description.message: Configurações que afetam o comportamento geral do Better Lyrics.

options_identityImport_chooseFile.description: Label for the file picker button in the import identity modal

options_identityImport_import.description: Confirm button label inside the import identity modal

options_identityImport_or.description: Divider between file picker and paste textarea in the import identity modal

options_identityImport_pastePlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the identity JSON textarea

options_identityImport_title.description: Title of the import identity modal

options_identity_description.message: Sua identidade anônima única para Better Lyrics.

options_identity_warning.description: Security warning in the Identity settings tab: keep the identity private and back it up because it is unrecoverable
options_identity_warning.message: Treat this like your password. Never share it. Export a backup. No one can recover a lost identity, not even admins.

options_language_description.message: Configurações de idioma e tradução para Better Lyrics.

options_language_displayLanguage.description: Label for the UI language selector dropdown

options_language_displayLanguageAuto.description: Option label for automatic language detection based on browser settings

options_nickname_description.message: Pick a name for yourself across Better Lyrics. Letters, numbers, and underscore, 3 to 20 characters.

options_nickname_editLabel.description: Accessible label for the nickname edit button

options_nickname_status_invalid.description: Status when nickname format is invalid

options_nickname_status_profane.description: Status when nickname is flagged as inappropriate by the server

options_nickname_status_rateLimited.description: Status when nickname checks are rate limited
options_nickname_status_rateLimited.message: Slow down, try again in a moment

options_nickname_status_self.description: Status when entered nickname matches current

options_nickname_status_submitting.description: Status while nickname save is in flight

options_nickname_status_taken.description: Status when nickname is already taken

options_romanization_hint.message: Click to toggle. Excluded languages will not be romanized.

options_romanization_resetMessage.message: This will clear all excluded languages. Continue?

options_sources_description.message: Arraste para reordenar a prioridade. Fontes superiores são tentadas primeiro. Desmarque para desativar.

options_sources_openUnison.description: Label on the small button in the Sources section header that opens the Unison page

options_syncType_line_tooltip.message: Destaca linhas inteiras conforme são cantadas. A sincronização por linha oferece uma experiência básica.

options_syncType_syllable_tooltip.message: Destaca sílabas individuais conforme são cantadas. A sincronização por sílaba oferece a melhor experiência.

options_syncType_unsynced_tooltip.message: Letras sem informações de tempo. Letras não sincronizadas oferecem uma experiência mínima.

options_syncType_word_tooltip.message: Destaca palavras individuais conforme são cantadas. A sincronização por palavra oferece uma boa experiência.

options_themes_customTheme.description: Display name for unnamed custom themes

options_themes_description.message: Personalize a aparência do Better Lyrics.

options_translation_hint.message: Click to toggle. Excluded source languages will not be translated.

options_unisonModal_autoHide.description: Toggle label inside the Unison Actions modal for auto-hiding the dock when idle in fullscreen

options_unisonModal_autoHide_hint.description: Hint text under the Auto-hide in fullscreen toggle
options_unisonModal_autoHide_hint.message: Hide the floating control when you are idle in fullscreen mode

options_unisonModal_position.description: Label above the visual position picker in the Unison Actions modal

options_unisonModal_position_bottomCente.description: Tooltip for the bottom-center cell in the Unison position picker

options_unisonModal_position_bottomLeft.description: Tooltip for the bottom-left cell in the Unison position picker

options_unisonModal_position_bottomRight.description: Tooltip for the bottom-right cell in the Unison position picker

options_unisonModal_position_topCenter.description: Tooltip for the top-center cell in the Unison position picker

options_unisonModal_position_topLeft.description: Tooltip for the top-left cell in the Unison position picker

options_unisonModal_position_topRight.description: Tooltip for the top-right cell in the Unison position picker

options_unisonModal_showPinned.description: Toggle label inside the Unison Actions modal for the floating dock

options_unisonModal_showPinned_hint.description: Hint text under the Show pinned actions toggle
options_unisonModal_showPinned_hint.message: A floating control to upvote, downvote, or report Unison lyrics

options_unisonModal_title.description: Title of the Unison Actions modal

report_lyrics_already.description: Shown when the user tries to report the same lyrics twice
report_lyrics_already.message: We've got this one already. Thanks though!

report_lyrics_bad_sync.description: Reason for the report that the lyrics are too off on the part synchronization

report_lyrics_details_placeholder.description: Placeholder for report lyrics details input

report_lyrics_error.description: Shown when a lyrics report fails to submit
report_lyrics_error.message: That didn't go through. Mind trying again?

report_lyrics_info.description: Information about using the report lyrics modal
report_lyrics_info.message: Specify the reason why the lyrics for this song are not compatible

report_lyrics_offensive.description: Reason for the report that the lyrics are offensive or too offensive

report_lyrics_other.description: Reason for the report that the lyrics is bad in other reasons

report_lyrics_reporting.description: Report lyrics on a reporting process

report_lyrics_spam.description: Reason for the report that the lyrics are a spam attempt and/or irrelevant with the sung parts
report_lyrics_spam.message: Spam or lyrics are irrelevant to the song

report_lyrics_success.description: Shown after a lyrics report is successfully submitted
report_lyrics_success.message: Thanks for the heads up! We'll take a look soon.

report_lyrics_title.description: Title for the report lyrics modal

report_lyrics_wrong_song.description: Reason for the report that the lyrics are for the wrong song or version

symlink_applied.description: Alert after successfully applying a symlinked theme from marketplace

symlink_badge_bundled.description: Badge text on non-symlinked built-in theme cards

symlink_badge_marketplace.description: Badge text on symlinked theme cards

symlink_installFailed.description: Alert when a symlinked theme fails to install from marketplace
symlink_installFailed.message: Couldn't install theme. Check your connection and try again.

theme_author_prefix.description: Author prefix shown on theme selector button

theme_author_you.description: Author label for custom user themes on theme selector button

theme_modal_section_builtin.description: Section title for built-in themes in the theme chooser modal

theme_modal_section_custom.description: Section title for custom themes in the theme chooser modal

unison_back.description: Back button text in detail view

unison_composerHintPrefix.description: Text before Composer link in submit hint

unison_composerHintSuffix.description: Text after Composer link in submit hint
unison_composerHintSuffix.message: to create word-synced lyrics from scratch.

unison_confidence_high.description: Tier label for entries with diverse community approval (rare, top tier)

unison_confidence_low.description: Tier label for entries with fewer than the minimum votes for confidence

unison_confidence_medium.description: Tier label for entries the community has accepted (the baseline 'good enough' tier)

unison_createInComposer.description: Create in Composer link text in dashboard

unison_delete.description: Delete button label on a user's own Unison submission card

unison_deleteConfirm.description: Delete button label after first click, asking the user to confirm before sending the request

unison_deleteFailed.description: Generic error message shown on the delete button when the request fails for any other reason

unison_deleteForbidden.description: Error message shown on the delete button when the server rejects the request because the caller is not the submitter

unison_deleteSuccess.description: Transient label shown on the delete button after a successful delete

unison_durationHint.description: Hint text below duration field label

unison_formatHint.description: Hint text below format field label

unison_fulfilledBadge.description: Badge on the Unison detail page shown when this lyric answered a community request

unison_fulfilledBoardLink.description: Link on the Unison detail page that opens the community requests board (queue of most-wanted songs)

unison_fulfilledNote.description: Sentence on the Unison detail page explaining that the lyric fulfilled a community request. $name$ is the uploader's display name
unison_fulfilledNote.message: Someone wanted this on Better Lyrics, and $name$ came through with it.

unison_languageUnspecified.description: Default option in the submission form's language dropdown, used when the submitter has not chosen a language

unison_loadMore.description: Auto-loading indicator shown at the bottom of the feed while the next page is being fetched

unison_noFeedYet.description: Empty state shown when the recent feed is empty with no filters applied

unison_noFilterResults.description: Empty state shown when the active sort/filter combination returns no entries

unison_noPreview.description: Empty state text shown in submit preview before lyrics are entered
unison_noPreview.message: Paste or drop lyrics to see a preview

unison_noResults.message: No lyrics found. Try a different search.

unison_noSubmissions.description: Empty state for my submissions tab
unison_noSubmissions.message: You haven't submitted any lyrics yet.

unison_openInYTMusic.description: Link text to open song in YouTube Music

unison_pageTitle.description: Page title for the Unison dashboard

unison_placeholder_album.message: e.g. A Night at the Opera

unison_placeholder_lyrics.message: Paste LRC, TTML, or plain text lyrics here. You can also drag & drop a file.

unison_preview.description: Column title for parsed lyrics preview in detail view

unison_rawLyrics.description: Column title for raw lyrics source in detail view

unison_score_label.description: Noun shown after the numeric score in the Unison footer (e.g. the 'score' in '4.85 score · 12 votes')

unison_sortBottomRated.description: Sort by effective score, lowest first

unison_sortLeastVoted.description: Sort by vote count, fewest first

unison_sortMostVoted.description: Sort by vote count, most first

unison_sortTopRated.description: Sort by effective score, highest first

unison_submitDescription.description: Description text for the submission form
unison_submitDescription.message: Submit community lyrics for any YouTube Music track. Paste LRC (timestamped), TTML (XML), or plain text. Synced formats are prioritized.

unison_submitFailed.description: Fallback error message when submission fails

unison_submitted_this.description: Sub-label under the submitter name in the Unison footer card

unison_sync.description: Sync type label in detail view

unison_syncLinesync.description: Sync type: line-level timing. Reused by the sync badge on cards and the sync filter chip

unison_syncPlain.description: Sync type: unsynced lyrics. Reused by the sync badge on cards and the sync filter chip

unison_syncRichsync.description: Sync type: word/syllable-level timing. Reused by the sync badge on cards and the sync filter chip

unison_tabFeed.description: Feed tab label for recent submissions

unison_tabMySubmissions.description: Feed tab label for user's own submissions

unison_tier.description: Filter bar group label for confidence tier

unison_tierTrustedPlus.description: Tier filter chip hiding Unverified entries (shows Trusted and above)

unison_tier_expert.description: Trust tier badge for top-reputation Unison submitters

unison_tier_new.description: Trust tier badge for low-reputation Unison submitters

unison_tier_trusted.description: Trust tier badge for mid-reputation Unison submitters

unison_tier_veteran.description: Trust tier badge for high-reputation Unison submitters

unison_uploadedBy.description: Metadata row label in the Unison detail sidebar, before the uploader's name which links to their curator page

unison_validationRequired.description: Validation error when required fields are missing
unison_validationRequired.message: Please fill in song, artist, video ID, and lyrics.

unison_videoIdHint.description: Hint text below video ID field label
unison_videoIdHint.message: 11-character ID from the YouTube Music URL

unison_vote_plural.description: Plural noun used after numbers other than 1 in the Unison vote count (e.g. '5 votes')

unison_vote_singular.description: Singular noun used after the number 1 in the Unison vote count (e.g. '1 vote')
